description: Canonical form preserves BC kind (§9.2). A dirichlet-only rule over a robin input: no rule matches, so the bc node passes through unchanged. Its canonical JSON MUST retain the kind under `fn` (symmetric with `dim`/`wrt`); otherwise bc(u,dirichlet,xmin) and bc(u,robin,xmin) would collapse to the same canonical form, making the kind/side matcher's canonical equality kind-blind. Pins the canonical_json `fn` emission added with the kind/side matcher (ess-tox/G8).
